---
title: "Diagram 3: Human and Agent accountability"
date: "2026-03-15"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Diagram 3: Human and Agent accountability

- **(H) Human** doesn't want to do certain chores, and would like to hire a helper.
- **(H)** can hire a temp worker called **(A) Agent**.
- But **(H)** is accountable for all of **(A)**'s work.
- Since **(A)** temp workers can change often, it's not feasible to interview them manually every time.

### Example: Exam scenario

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A(("A (Agent)"))
    exam["Exam 10/10"]
    subgraph work["Work"]
        H(("H (Human)"))
        Awork(("A (Agent)"))
    end

    A -- "takes" --> exam
    exam -- "works where Human does" --> work
```

::: {.callout-caution title="Skill uncertainty notes" collapse="true"}
- A appears twice (before and inside Work) to show the progression — could be simplified if preferred
:::
